name: Kubernetes
summary: Container orchestration. Deploy, scale, heal containers tự động. Pod, Service, Deployment, Ingress.

facts.text: Pod: smallest unit, 1+ containers share network/storage
Service: stable DNS + load balance cho Pods
Deployment: declarative desired state, rolling update
Ingress: HTTP routing từ ngoài vào Services

danger: resource limits không set → noisy neighbor
